name: Vanilla Butternut Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Evaporated milk (or 2/3 cup evaporated milk and water to equal 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the evaporated milk with water if using, until you have a total of 1 cup.
2. Cream together the shortening, margarine, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Add eggs one at a time to the mixture, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add flour and milk (or evaporated milk mixture) to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with flour.
5. Gently fold in the butternut flavoring using your hands.
6. Grease a tube pan and pour the batter into it.
7. Place the cake in a cold oven.
8. Turn on the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 45 minutes, making sure not to open the door during baking.
10. Remove the cake from the pan immediately after removing it from the oven.
